decks.notes: The main idea behind this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to outvalue your opponent. By utilizing cards like Abandon Attachments and Soul-Guide Lantern to disrupt your opponent's strategy, as well as generating card advantage with Accumulate Wisdom and Artist's Talent, you can gradually gain control of the game. The versatile nature of the Izzet colors allows you to adapt to various threats and maintain a strong board presence while protecting your own life total.

The deck focuses on utilizing a combination of spells and creatures to control the game, using cards like Monument to Endurance and Gran-Gran to stall and generate advantage. Artist's Talent and Stormchaser's Talent provide additional control options, while cards like Abandon Attachments and Accumulate Wisdom offer card advantage. Combustion Technique and Firebending Lesson serve as removal spells, with It'll Quench Ya! and Agna Qel'a providing additional utility. The mana base allows for a consistent casting of spells, ensuring the deck can maintain control throughout the game.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, while also benefiting from landfall triggers with cards like Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer. The deck aims to flood the board with low-cost creatures like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo, and use powerful combat tricks like Archdruid's Charm and Bristly Bill, Spine Sower to overwhelm the opponent and deal massive damage quickly. Escape Tunnel and Promising Vein provide additional versatility and card advantage, making this Mono Green Aggro deck a formidable force in the Standard 1 vs 1 format.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a board presence with efficient creatures and generating mana to cast powerful spells. It utilizes cards like Llanowar Elves and Fecund Greenshell to ramp up and play threats like Bristly Bill, Spine Sower and Earthbender Ascension. Escape Tunnel provides a way to protect key creatures from removal, while cards like Ba Sing Se and Mightform Harmonizer give additional benefits to the aggro strategy. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of early aggression and powerful, resilient threats.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells in order to quickly establish board presence and maintain pressure. Utilizing a combination of flying creatures, card draw, and removal spells, the deck aims to control the battlefield and deal damage efficiently. With cards like Aven Interrupter, Floodpits Drowner, and High Noon, the deck can quickly build a formidable army while disrupting the opponent's game plan. Ajani, Outland Chaperone, Seam Rip, and Voice of Victory provide additional support and ways to push through for victories.

This deck focuses on using fast, low-cost creatures to quickly overwhelm the opponent and deal damage efficiently. The key strategy is to establish a strong board presence early on with cards like Llanowar Elves and Sapling Nursery, while also using Escape Tunnel to protect key creatures. Archdruid's Charm and Earthbender Ascension provide additional support and buffs to enhance the aggro strategy. Overall, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent and outpace them with a consistent stream of aggressive creatures and spells.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize aggressive creatures such as Ashling, Rekindled and Flamebraider to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Bounce Off and Deceit to control the board and protect your creatures. Additionally, the deck features a mix of lands to ensure consistent mana production and allow for a variety of colored spells to be cast. Overall, this deck focuses on a fast-paced, aggressive playstyle with a combination of creature power and spell control.

The focus of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Shock, along with creatures like Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off, the deck aims to deal damage quickly and efficiently. The inclusion of cards like Stock Up and Boomerang Basics provide additional card advantage and disruption. The mana base supports the aggressive nature of the deck, with Steam Vents and Spirebluff Canal allowing for consistent access to all necessary colors.

This deck focuses on quickly filling your graveyard with powerful creatures and then bringing them back onto the battlefield for a devastating attack. Use cards like Bitter Triumph and Deceit to discard creatures, then use Requiting Hex and Insatiable Avarice to reanimate them. Don't forget to protect your strategy with cards like Deadly Cover-Up and Stock Up. Superior Spider-Man and Doomsday Excruciator are your key reanimation targets, while Winternight Stories can provide additional graveyard manipulation. Control the board with cards like Shoot the Sheriff and Harvester of Misery to ensure your combo goes off smoothly.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw to maintain board presence and disrupt the opponent's strategy. By using cards like Abandon Attachments, Artist's Talent, and Firebending Lesson, the deck aims to control the battlefield and outvalue the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Agna Qel'a and Three Steps Ahead further enhance the deck's ability to control the game and maintain advantage. The mana base is designed to support the deck's control strategy with efficient fixing and mana acceleration.

The main concept of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing low mana cost creatures like Emberheart Challenger and Fanatical Firebrand, as well as efficient burn spells like Burst Lightning and Lightning Helix, the deck aims to deal damage early and often. The inclusion of cards like Boros Charm and Boltwave provide additional ways to push for damage and outpace the opponent. With a focus on speed and aggression, this deck aims to secure victory before the opponent can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deal damage to the opponent using aggressive red creatures and burn spells. With a low mana curve and a high number of direct damage spells, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own board presence. This strategy is supported by cards that provide additional creature buffs and evasion abilities to ensure that the damage output remains constant and difficult to block or mitigate. Overall, the deck prioritizes speed, aggression, and efficient use of resources to achieve victory.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and burn spells. The goal is to deal damage quickly and efficiently, utilizing a mix of creatures like Hexing Squelcher and Howlsquad Heavy, along with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Lightning Strike. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Nova Hellkite and Burnout Bashtronaut to secure victory. The mana base is streamlined with mostly Mountain cards, allowing for consistent access to the deck's spells. The inclusion of cards like Soulstone Sanctuary and Tersa Lightshatter provide additional utility and resilience against opposing strategies.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a mix of cards that provide card advantage, removal, and counter spells. By efficiently managing resources and disrupting the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to stall the game until it can establish a dominant position and win through incremental advantage. The combination of card draw, counterspells, removal, and versatile threats gives the deck the tools it needs to outlast and outmaneuver opponents in a long game.

The main strategy of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with low-cost aggressive creatures and control spells, while utilizing card draw and mana efficiency. The deck focuses on tempo and disruption, using cards like Bitter Triumph and Gloomlake Verge to slow down the opponent's game plan. With a mix of evasive creatures like Spyglass Siren and Floodpits Drowner, along with removal and counterspells, the deck aims to maintain board presence and pressure the opponent to victory. The inclusion of Kaito, Bane of Nightmares and Tishana's Tidebinder adds extra versatility and power to the deck.

The main objective of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and pump spells in order to deal damage as efficiently as possible. By utilizing cards like Stormchaser's Talent, Valley Floodcaller, and Thundertrap Trainer, this deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early on and close out the game before the opponent has the chance to stabilize. The combination of creatures with pump spells like Stock Up and Enduring Vitality allows for explosive turns and can catch the opponent off guard. The deck also includes some control elements like Boomerang Basics and Analyze the Pollen to deal with threats from the opponent and ensure that the game remains in your favor.
